title: Zombie Apocalypse
description: Experience never seen zombie apocalypse with guns for fabric
body:
**Zombie Apocalypse Modpack for Fabric**  
*Experience a relentless, thrilling zombie survival challenge like never before.*

**Overview:**  
The *Zombie Apocalypse Modpack* for Fabric brings an intense survival experience to Minecraft, featuring hordes of zombies, guns, dynamic environments, and custom structures to explore. Designed for both client and server environments, each version of this modpack is carefully optimized to ensure smooth performance without sacrificing gameplay depth. Whether you’re defending your base or exploring abandoned towns, expect danger at every corner.

**Features:**  
- **Zombie Hordes:** Zombies spawn in greater numbers and with smarter AI, creating immersive survival scenarios that will keep you on edge.
- **Guns & Firearms:** Equip yourself with powerful weapons to hold off relentless zombie swarms, adding a tactical layer to combat and survival.
- **Diverse Environments:** Custom maps and biome modifications enhance the survival atmosphere, making each biome a new challenge to overcome.
- **Unique Loot & Gear:** Discover powerful gear and supplies hidden in challenging dungeons, making exploration as rewarding as it is dangerous.
- **Tailored Performance:** Choose from the single-player or server variants, each optimized to run smoothly on their respective platforms.

**Gameplay Tips:**  
- Travel with caution; zombies are faster and more resilient than ever.
- Use guns wisely – ammo is scarce, so make every shot count!
- Survive as a team on the server versions for the ultimate cooperative challenge.

**Note**: For an even more intense experience, download [Tissou's Zombie Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tissous-zombie-pack-optifine-1-7x-1-20/files/4750306) to add terrifying custom zombie textures (not included in this modpack).

**Some other Versions:**  
- **Zombie Apocalypse [MAP]** *(Client with Custom Map)*: Experience the apocalypse on a custom-crafted map designed to intensify gameplay.
- **Zombie Apocalypse Server**: Host a seamless multiplayer zombie apocalypse, with mods optimized for server stability and performance.
- **Zombie Apocalypse Server [MAP]**: Host multiplayer survival on the custom map, providing a unique and challenging experience for your friends or community.
